criteria_results.description: File `architecture.md` exists and contains sections for 'Overview', 'State Management (Split Context)', and 'Coordinate Transformation'.

criteria_results.description: File `DEV_README.md` exists and provides a file-by-file description for at least 15 core files in `client/src` and `server/`.

criteria_results.description: `README.md` is updated to mention the Postgres/Drizzle backend and the current 'Network Passportization' features.

criteria_results.description: The logic flow of object creation and PDF export is explicitly described in `architecture.md`.
criteria_results.evidence: architecture.md contains a '## Logic Flows' section with detailed 'Object Creation' and 'Project Export (PDF & ZIP)' sub-sections.

suggestions: Consider adding a Mermaid.js diagram to architecture.md to visualize the Screen-to-PDF coordinate mapping pipeline for even better clarity.
